case_title: MAUREEN CHEN VS. STEPHEN G COHEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MAUREEN AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, STEPHEN G AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 25, INDIVIDUAL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-26-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-26-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-03-2015
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 57552047) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MAUREEN AN INDIVIDUAL ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT COHEN, STEPHEN G AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-27-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE AUG-26-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO AUGUST 10, 2015 CASE MANAGEMENT ORDER (TRANSACTION ID # 58035415) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, MAUREEN AN INDIVIDUAL
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-27-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-29-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, MAUREEN AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COHEN, STEPHEN G AN INDIVIDUAL $506,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $506,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-29-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
